sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: WELLTOWER INC.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 보통주 주주 귀속 순이익은 희석 주당 0.14달러, 분기 정규화 FFO는 주당 1.45달러였습니다.
연간 보통주 주주 귀속 순이익은 주당 1.39달러, 정규화 FFO는 주당 5.29달러로 전년 대비 22.5% 증가했습니다.
4분기 RevPOR이 4.7% 성장하고 동일점포 순영업이익(SSNOI) 마진이 270bps 개선됐습니다.

businessChanges.text: 4분기 중 139억 달러 규모의 총투자를 완료했으며 영국 인수 건도 마무리했습니다.
첫 사모펀드 비히클인 시니어스 하우징 펀드 I를 약 25억 달러 규모로 출범하고 시니어스 하우징 데트 펀드 I도 출시했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 중 75억 달러 규모의 자산 매각 및 대출 상환을 완료했습니다.
2025년 말 기준 순부채 대비 조정 EBITDA는 3.03배, 가용 유동성은 약 102억 달러였습니다.

watchItems.text: 사모펀드 비히클 출범으로 자본 경량형 운용 모델이 확대되는 흐름에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
22.5%에 달한 연간 정규화 FFO 성장세가 2026년에도 이어질지가 핵심입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a4q25earningsrelease991.htm EX-99.1 Document FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE February 10, 2026 For more information contact: Tim McHugh (419) 247-2800 Welltower Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results Toledo, Ohio, February 10, 2026 ….. Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL ) today announced results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. Fourth Quarter and Other Recent Highlights • Reported net income attributable to common stockholders of $0.14 per diluted share • Reported quarterly normalized funds from operations attributable to common stockholders of $1.45 per diluted share, an increase of 28.3% over the prior year • Reported total portfolio year-over-year same store NOI ("SSNOI") growth of 15.0%, driven by SSNOI growth in our Seniors Housing Operating ("SHO") portfolio of 20.4% • SHO portfolio organic same store revenue growth increased 9.6% year-over-year in the fourth quarter, resulting from 40  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.14 = 0.14달러; $1.45 = 1.45달러.

0 basis points ("bps") of average occupancy growth and 4.7% growth in Revenue Per Occupied Room ("RevPOR"); SSNOI margin expanded by 270 bps year-over-year • During the fourth quarter, we completed $13.9 billion of pro rata gross investments, which included the closing of all previously announced acquisitions in the U.K. • Additionally, we completed $7.5 billion of pro rata dispositions and loan payoffs during the fourth quarter, with volume and pace of activity exceeding prior expectations. Pro rata property dispositions of $6.1 billion included the earlier-than-anticipated sale of the first three tranches of the previously announced Outpatient Medical ("OM") real estate portfolio in addition to the previously unannounced sale of skilled nursing properties. We also received $1.4 billi  Normalized numeric aliases: $13.9 billion = 139억 달러; $7.5 billion = 75억 달러; $6.1 billion = 61억 달러; $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $13.9 = 13.9달러; $7.5 = 7.5달러; $6.1 = 6.1달러; $1.4 = 1.4달러; 0 basis points = 0포인트.

wly announced pro rata gross investments, exclusive of development funding of $5.7 billion • During the fourth quarter, we closed our inaugural private fund vehicle, Seniors Housing Fund I, securing approximately $2.5 billion of total equity commitments. Additionally, during the fourth quarter we launched Seniors Housing Debt Fund I • As of December 31, 2025, reported Net Debt to Adjusted EBITDA of 3.03x and approximately $10.2 billion of available liquidity inclusive of $5.2 billion of available cash and restricted cash and full capacity under our $5.0 billion line of credit • Expanded the previously announced 10 Year Executive Continuity and Alignment Program to include seven Executive Vice Presidents of Welltower who have agreed to a reduced annual salary and a single,  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.7 billion = 57억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $10.2 billion = 102억 달러; $5.2 billion = 52억 달러; $5.0 billion = 50억 달러; $5.7 = 5.7달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $10.2 = 10.2달러; $5.0 = 5.0달러; $5.2 = 5.2달러.

rs of Welltower, the "all-in" incentive structure now encompasses 12 leaders who will receive no additional compensation, beyond a reduced annual base salary and one-time equity-based incentive award 2025 Annual Highlights • Reported net income attributable to common stockholders of $1.39 per diluted share • Reported annual normalized FFO attributable to common stockholders of $5.29 per diluted share, an increase of 22.5% over the prior year • Meaningfully amplified the Company's long-term growth trajectory through the completion of $11 billion of pro rata net investments, excluding development funding, anchored by acquisitions of seniors housing communities in the U.S. and U.K. and disposition of lower growth outpatient medical properties • Announced the next era of our journey, "Welltower 3.0", underscoring our commitment to modernizing the seniors housing sector through a reimagined c  Normalized numeric aliases: $11 billion = 110억 달러; $1.39 = 1.39달러; $5.29 = 5.29달러; $11 = 11달러.
